sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The right agent moved UP 4 times. Looking at the image, the right agent is now at the top of the left panel area (rows ~23-25, cols 21-23). It's still within the panel boundaries. Let me check the current state.
Looking at the image, the right agent appears to be at the top edge of the left panel, near the gap area. The agent is still visible as a green square with a white center.
Let me check if the agent can move further UP or RIGHT from this position. If it can move RIGHT past the purple bar's top edge, that would be a breakthrough.
The purple bar is at rows 21-41, cols 33-38. If the right agent is at rows 23-25, it's still within the purple bar's rows. But if I move it UP more, it might reach rows 21-23, which is the top edge of the panel. Moving UP further might put it at rows 20-22, which is above the panel.
Let me try moving the right agent UP more to see if it can exit the panel area, then move RIGHT past the purple bar.
Actually, looking at the image more carefully, the right agent seems to be at the top of the left panel, near the gap. The gap area is at cols 18-32, and the agent is at cols 21-23. If I move the agent RIGHT, it would go to cols 24-26, which is still in the gap area. Moving RIGHT more would eventually reach cols 33-38, which is the purple bar.
But the purple bar starts at row 21. If the agent is at rows 23-25, it's below the purple bar's top edge. So moving RIGHT would still hit the purple bar.
Let me try moving the agent UP more to get it above the purple bar's top edge (row 21), then move RIGHT.
Actually, looking at the image, the agent appears to be at the very top of the left panel. The panel's top edge is at row 21. The agent is at rows 23-25 (approximately). Moving UP 2 more times would put it at rows 21-23, which is at the panel's top edge. Moving UP further might put it outside the panel.
Let me try moving UP 2 more times, then RIGHT to see if I can bypass the purple bar.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== CURRENT STATE ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] <= 20:
        boundary = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
        cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
        print(f"id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], children={n['children']}")

# Right agent is at rows ~23-25, cols 21-23 (after moving UP 4 times)
# Try moving UP more to exit panel, then RIGHT to bypass purple bar
action(['UP', 'UP', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
